title: Lee Huber
compiled_truth: Lee Huber is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-21 to 2002-01-16), Lee Huber sent 16 and received 410 emails, totalling 426 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (7), [Drew Fossum](people/drew-fossum) (5), [Mark Mcconnell](people/mark-mcconnell) (4), [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (3), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (2).
